notes: Critical fixes after v8/v9 review: the prior cutStart values for the first pack were fallback/late card-visible moments, not slide-start moments.
Use absolute seconds from the original Bowman source video.

reviews.note: Billy Edwards Jr. starts revealing under Junior Vandeross around original 1:50.3.
Jovantae Barnes starts revealing under Billy Edwards Jr. around original 1:52.6.
Jadan Baugh starts revealing under Jovantae Barnes around original 1:57.3.
Move Quinton Martin Jr. reveal later; previous detected start was too early and made the second pack feel like it skipped the second card.
